title: Cute Plush Bros' Wither storm modpack
description: This is my personal line of mods that work well (in my opinion) with Cracker's wither storm mod!
body:
This is my personal line of mods that work well (in my opinion) with Cracker's wither storm mod!

The most important mods in this list are:
Cracker's wither storm mod (of course)
The aether and the aether: redux
Xaero's minimap and Xaero's world map
ChoiceTheorum's overhauled village
Elytra slot
Dragon mounts: legacy
Mouse tweaks
No fog (if you dont want it you can disable it or delete the file in the modrinth app)
Supplementaries
Twigs
Waystones
Cat jam
And quite a few more!

Now for all the resource packs!

Better Lanterns
CWSM Enhancements
Default Dark Mode
Enhanced Boss Bars
Fresh Animations
LucasDotje's Story Mode Storm
Mandala's GUI - Dark mode
Programmer Art+
